title: 1000 Pcs Push Pins Map Tacks, Map Pins with Coloured Heads Drawing Pins for World Map, Cork Board, Fabric Marking, DIY
features: 📍 Package includes: comes with 1000 pieces map push pins in 10 different colours, each colour has 100 pieces. Each colour is stored separately in a plastic box, you can use them for decoration or colour marking.
📍 Durable material: Map pins with coloured heads are made of plastic and needle tips made of steel. Needle firmly attached to the plastic head, strong and durable, can be used for a long time.

📍 Size: the coloured push pins for notice board have a diameter of about 1/8 inch and a length of 1.5 cm. These small push pin can be easily inserted into cork boards, notice boards, cards, photos etc.
📍 Easy to use: you can simply insert the push pins for notice board into the cork plate, which are equipped with sharp steel tips. The pressure pins are strong enough to prevent bending.
📍 Wide application: the colourful thumbtacks are suitable for attaching photos, pictures and papers to cork boards, notice boards, foam boards and cards. Not suitable for hard walls.
description: Product Description --10 Colors, each color has 100 pieces packing in a clear plastic box, 1000 pieces push pins in total --Made of hard plastic and stainless steel, created to stand years of use --Apply to mark locations, points of interests, travel routes, addresses and others on maps Specification: Material: Plastic Round Heads And Steel Needle Points Color: 10 colors Size: As picture Package included: 1Set (1000pcs/box set) x Push Pins Pushpins can be used to stick and display your photos Pin locations on the map to plan your travels Pin your message on the cork notice board
